zh.lifeSummary: 當Conrad Tresenreuter於1714年出生在德國時，他的父親Johann Adam Tresenreuther38歲，母親Maria Magdalena Kurz33歲。他與Anna Elisabetha在德國巴登-爾特波格烏爾姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 可包格可包格 格梅德福萊斯 格比特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Conrad Tresenreuter于1714年出生在德国时，他的父亲Johann Adam Tresenreuther38岁，母亲Maria Magdalena Kurz33岁。他与Anna Elisabetha在德国巴登-爾特波格烏爾姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 可包格可包格 格梅德福萊斯 格比特。

nameMeanings.name: Conrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English spelling of Konrad, a Germanic personal name derived from kuon ‘bold’ + rad ‘counsel’. It was used occasionally in Britain in the Middle Ages in honour of a 10th-century bishop of Constance, but modern use in the English-speaking world is a reimportation from Germany dating mainly from the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Germans defeat Napolean in Leipzig
historicEvents.description: On Oct 19, 1813, Germany defeats Napolean. The commanding officer for the Allied side was Prince Karl Phillipp Schwarzenberg.
The Congress of Vienna established the German Confederation of 39 independent German states.

en.lifeSummary: When Conrad Tresenreuter was born in 1714, in Germany, his father, Johann Adam Tresenreuther, was 38 and his mother, Maria Magdalena Kurz, was 33. He married Anna Elisabetha in Ulm, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in Coburg Gemeindefreies Gebiet, Coburg, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conrad Tresenreuter est né en 1714, à Allemagne, son père, Johann Adam Tresenreuther, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Maria Magdalena Kurz, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Anna Elisabetha à Ulm, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé à Coburg Gemeindefreies Gebiet, Landkreis Coburg, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conrad Tresenreuter 1714 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johann Adam Tresenreuther 38 und seine Mutter Maria Magdalena Kurz 33. Er hat in Ulm, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland Anna Elisabetha geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb in Coburg Gemeindefreies Gebiet, Landkreis Coburg, Bayern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conrad Tresenreuter è nato il nel 1714 nel Germania, il suo padre, Johann Adam Tresenreuther, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Maria Magdalena Kurz, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Anna Elisabetha nel Ulm, Baden-Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel Coburg Gemeindefreies Gebiet, Landkreis Coburg, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Conrad Tresenreuterが1714年にドイツで生まれた時，父Johann Adam Tresenreutherは38歳，母Maria Magdalena Kurzは33歳であった。ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグウルムでAnna Elisabethaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼はドイツバイエルンランドクレイス コブルグコブルグ ジェメインデフレイス ジェビエトで死去した。

ko.Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 컵르그 컵르그 그인데프레이스 게비트
ko.lifeSummary: Conrad Tresenreuter(이)가 1714년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Adam Tresenreuther(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Magdalena Kurz(은)는 33세였다. 그는 독일 바데-wu르테버그 울름에서 Anna Elisabetha(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 컵르그 컵르그 그인데프레이스 게비트에서 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Anna Elisabetha em Ulm, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em Coburg Gemeindefreies Gebiet, Landkreis Coburg, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conrad Tresenreuter родился в 1714 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Johann Adam Tresenreuther было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Magdalena Kurz, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Elisabetha в местности улм, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в местности кобург джеминдефриесь джебиет, ландкрис кобург, беиирн, Германия.
